entry.title: New: CC 24-27 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
COUNCILMEMBER RAWLINS-FERNANDEZ, transmitting a proposed amendment to Bill 28, CD1 (2024), entitled "A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE TO AMEND THE STATE LAND USE DISTRICT CLASSIFICATION FROM AGRICULTURAL DISTRICT TO URBAN DISTRICT (CONDITIONAL DISTRICT BOUNDARY AMENDMENT) FOR PROPERTY SITUATED AT WAILUKU, MAUI, HAWAII, PORTION OF TAX MAP KEY (2) 3-3-001:106".

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
